zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen於1267年8月出生在德國布勞恩史維布勞恩史維時，他的父親Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg31歲，母親Alessia di Monferrato30歲。他於1282年1月與Agnes von Meißen結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他於1291年被列為sächsisches pfalzgrafenamt。他去世於1322年9月7日在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福艾音貝可艾音貝可薩爾茲德爾登享年55歲。

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen was born in August 1267, in Brunswick, Brunswick, Germany, his father, Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, was 31 and his mother, Alessia di Monferrato, was 30. He married Agnes von Meißen in January 1282. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 10 daughters. In 1291, at the age of 24, his occupation is listed as sächsisches pfalzgrafenamt. He died on 7 September 1322, in Salzderhelden, Einbeck, Einbeck, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 55.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen nasceu em agosto de 1267, em Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Alemanha, seu pai, Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alessia di Monferrato, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes von Meißen em janeiro de 1282. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 10 filhas. Em 1291, com 24 anos, sua profissão aparece como sächsisches pfalzgrafenamt. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1322, em Salzderhelden, Einbeck, Kreis Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich I. von Braunschweig-Grubenhagen родился август 1267 г. в местности браунщвиг, браунщвиг, Германия, его отцу по имени Albrecht I. der Große Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alessia di Monferrato, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes von Meißen январь 1282 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 10 дочерей. В 1291 году, в возрасте 24 лет,  он работал по профессии sächsisches pfalzgrafenamt. Он умер 7 сентября 1322 г. в местности салздирелден, эинбекк, крис эинбекк, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 55 лет.
